UserProfile.title: UserProfile
UserProfile.description: User account tracking credits, learning streaks, unlockable study badges, and stats

credits.description: Virtual study and AI generation credits

lastReviewedAt.description: Timestamp of the last card or deck review

streakUpdateDate.description: YYYY-MM-DD representing the date of streak validation

unlockedBadges.description: List of unlockable study badges rewarded to the student

Deck.title: Deck
Deck.description: Study decks containing spaced repetition flashcards

title.description: Deck academic title (e.g., Arabic Biology, Chemistry Term 1)

Card.title: Card
Card.description: A flashcard utilizing SM-2 spaced repetition, detailed Arabic descriptions, and search indexing

front.description: Flashcard front side context (concept, formula, or word)

back.description: Flashcard back side details or academic explanation

arabicFront.description: Arabic counterpart translation or phonetic pronunciation hint for front

arabicBack.description: Arabic detailed explanation equivalent for back

interval.description: Spaced repetition dynamic step interval in days (SM-2)

eaFactor.description: Spaced repetition ease-factor value (SM-2, standard starting value is 2.5)

nextDue.description: Standard timestamp denoting next due review

masteryLevel.description: Individual intelligence level (0: Learning, 1: Familiar, 2: Proficient, 3: Mastered)

notes.description: Student notes appended over time for search indexing

users/{userId}.description: Main user collection capturing profile details and gaming rewards

users/{userId}/decks/{deckId}/cards/{car.description: Subcollection storing flashcards for spaced repetition
